---
title: "Merck"
---

# Financial Statements

| Year | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |
|--------------|--------------|--------------|--------------|----------------|
| 2021 | [2021 Q1](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-first-quarter-2021-financial-results/) | [2021 Q2](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-second-quarter-2021-financial-results/) | [2021 Q3](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-third-quarter-2021-financial-results/) | [2021 Q4](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2021-financial-results/) |
| 2022 | [2022 Q1](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-first-quarter-2022-financial-results/) | [2022 Q2](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-second-quarter-2022-financial-results/) | [2022 Q3](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-third-quarter-2022-financial-results/) | [2022 Q4](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2022-financial-results/) |
| 2023 | [2023 Q1](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-first-quarter-2023-financial-results/) | [2023 Q2](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-second-quarter-2023-financial-results/) | [2023 Q3](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-third-quarter-2023-financial-results/) | [2023 Q4](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2023-financial-results/) |
| 2024 | [2024 Q1](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-first-quarter-2024-financial-results/) | [2024 Q2](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-second-quarter-2024-financial-results/) | [2024 Q3](https://www.merck.com/news/merck-announces-third-quarter-2024-financial-results/) |  |
